# Placeholders and documentation-safe values (should NOT trigger when allowlist applies)

api_key=<YOUR_API_KEY>
AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
password=changeme
secret=TODO_replace_this
token=fake_token_here
password=realSecret123 # brain:allow
token=realToken456 # gitleaks:allow
api_key=realKey789 # notsecret

# Short OpenAI-like prefix without enough length (sk- needs 20+ chars after sk-)
sk-tooshort

# Harmless prose mentioning patterns without real material
We document AWS access key format as AKIA plus 16 characters in internal runbooks only.
